candidate_definition_hints.text: t-Stochastic Neighborhood Embedding ([t-SNE](https://lvdmaaten.github.io/tsne/)) is a highly successful method for dimensionality reduction and visualization of high dimensional datasets. A popular [implementation](https://github.com/lvdmaaten/bhtsne) of t-SNE uses the Barnes-Hu…
